corrections.current: καὶ ἀπὸ υἱῶν Σαλειμοὺθ υἱὸς Ἰωσεφία
corrections.correct: καὶ ἀπὸ υἱῶν Σαλειμοὺθ, υἱὸς Ἰωσεφία
corrections.note: Comma after Σαλειμοὺθ is present in print.
Transcript has wrong character order: ὑιὸς for υἱὸς.
Printed name is Ἀδανεικάμ, not Ἀδωνεικάμ.
Initial letter in print appears eta, matching apparatus ηησου/Ησοα rather than Ιησοα.
Apparatus prints Greek siglum Ἀ, not Latin A.

corrections.current: Ἠλαμ Α | Ἰοσεια] Ἠσαια Α | Ἀθελει] Ἀθλια Α Α
corrections.correct: Ἠλαμ Ἀ | Ἰοσεια] Ἠσαια Ἀ | Ἀθελει] Ἀθλια Ἀ Ἀ
corrections.note: Greek sigla Ἀ are printed throughout, not Latin A.

corrections.current: all occurrences of manuscript siglum A transcribed as Latin A
corrections.correct: all occurrences should be Greek Ἀ
corrections.note: Throughout the apparatus on this page, Swete prints Greek siglum Ἀ, not Latin A.
No change to wording; included only to note the siglum issue handled globally.
Printed parenthetical gloss appears to include full form Ἀλωνᾶμ, not truncated Ἀλων.
Printed lemma has initial alpha with smooth breathing and accent: ᾄδοντας.

notes: Running head matches. Main body largely correct aside from a few name/number issues and one duplicated verse number. Apparatus transcription is substantially correct in content, but manuscript siglum Ἀ has been normalized to Latin A throughout.
